creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 216867
sysutils/logstash7: Update to 7.8.1

Hi,

please find the patch attached.

Changelogs between 7.7.1 and 7.8.1 are long:

https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/logstash/current/logstash-7-8-0.html
https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/logstash/current/logstash-7-8-1.html
